tasks.noticing_probe_answer: No. The provided spec/context files were accurate. The `schema.ts` correctly showed `errorEnvelopeStyle` set to `"code_message"`, the specs consistently referenced `error.code`/`error.message`, and `server.ts` already contained the `errorBody` function with logic to support both `"code_message"` and `"type_detail"` styles — so flipping the config was sufficient. Everything reconciled as described.
tasks.nl_request: We're revising how the API communicates certain details to clients — bring it up to date.

tasks.noticing_probe_answer:
No. The spec/context files were accurate. The only gap was an undocumented implementation detail: `seed.ts` must contain an entry (even an empty array) for every entity, since `server.ts` returns 404 when `store.get(route.entity)` finds no table. This wasn't stated in the README or specs but wasn't inaccurate — just implicit in the code.

<<<DONE>>>
tasks.nl_request: We're launching Promotion as a new resource — customers need to be able to track it.
